---
title: "\'The Ladies\' Home\'"
---

## \'The Ladies\' Home\'

**Author:** Caroline Louise Alcock
**Date:** 1867
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (August 1867) 179-80.

### Notes

The authorship is attributed on the basis of CMY\'s note to Miss Alcock thanking her for the paper.  Alcock is named in it as the Hon. Secretary of the charity, with the same address as that to which CMY\'s note was addressed.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
